fields.question: en: i accept that paradox group stores my personal data for 2 years in order to reach out for new opportunities.
options: I accept the retention of my information during a maximum of 2 years

what are your preferred ways of working?

Remote first, but I can be here for some events or team buildings
Weekly hybrid (a few days a week in the office, a few days home office)
Yearly hybrid (a few weeks/months a year in the office, a few weeks/months a year remote)

fields.question: are you open to relocating?

I am definitely open to relocating
I am already planning to relocate
I will not be able or don't want to relocate

I haven’t heard neither of David Laroche nor Paradox before seeing the offer

how many years of professional experience do you have in the field of the position you're applying for?
if we reach the end of the hiring process, are you ok with us conducting 3 reference calls with your former managers, peers and/or clients (depending on the context)?
options: Why not, but I’m not sure I can get 3 people
I would like to but I definitely cannot get 3 people
I am opposed to giving contacts for reference calls

fields.question: what top 3 elements would make your approach to your work in this particular position stand out from other candidates?
how many books related to the field of the position or to personal / professional development have you read?
how do you usually grow your professional knowledge and skills?
how comfortable are you with digital tools?
options: 0 - NOVICE: I am not familiar with digital tools and need significant guidance and training to use them effectively.
1 - BEGINNER: I have limited experience using digital tools and need some guidance and training to use them effectively.
2 - INTERMEDIATE: I am comfortable using a variety of digital tools and require minimal guidance and training to use them effectively.
3 - ADVANCED: I have extensive experience using a variety of digital tools and can use them effectively without much guidance or training.
4 - EXPERT: I have a deep understanding of digital tools and can use them to solve complex problems and achieve business goals.

fields.question: what type of digital tools are you already comfortable using?
options: Funnel/mailing: Click Funnel, Active Campaign, Customer.io, etc.
Data/BI: Google Data Studio, PowerBI, etc.
Ads: Facebook ads, Google Ads, Linkedin Ads, etc.
I don't know how to use any of the above tools

fields.question: which tech skills have you demonstrated in the past and are comfortable with?
options: I don't have any of the above tech skills

fields.question: how comfortable are you with using ai in your work?
options: 0 - NOVICE: I am not familiar with AI tools and need significant guidance and training to use them effectively.
1- BEGINNER: I've used ChatGPT or similar AI tools a few times. I would need guidance & training to integrate AI into my work.
2 - INTERMEDIATE: I use AI tools like ChatGPT, Notion AI or Canva AI to support my work. I can integrate basic AI workflow with tools like Zapier, Make, ...
3 - ADVANCED: I have extensive experience. Built custom automations, used APIs or advances GPT features and experimented with new tools independently.
4 - EXPERT: I have a deep understanding of AI Tools. I understand model mechanics, code Python, build/deploy AI models or agents to solve business problems.
